company.name_jp: 日興テクノス株式会社

research_notes: President 長谷川浩正 confirmed from company greeting page. Founded 1946-09-18, 80 years of history. 89 employees. Capital 2,000万JPY. Fourth-generation family business (founder: 荒木政一). FUJITSU partner. Multiple certifications including ISO14001, Privacy Mark, Bright 500 for 5 consecutive years. Extensive employee certifications listed.
